tasks.name: Create Cargo workspace with 3-crate structure and all dependencies
Create SQLite schema (all normalized tables) with embedded migration and WAL initialization

deviations.description: Removed fts5 feature flag from rusqlite dependency — rusqlite 0.37/0.38 does not expose fts5 as a standalone feature. Bundled SQLite includes FTS5 support by default when the 'bundled' feature is enabled.
deviations.impact: none — FTS5 remains available via bundled SQLite

deviations.description: Downgraded rusqlite from 0.38 to 0.37 to resolve libsqlite3-sys version conflict with tokio-rusqlite 0.7.0 (which depends on rusqlite 0.37). Cargo cannot link two versions of the sqlite3 native library.
deviations.impact: minor — rusqlite 0.37 vs 0.38 API is nearly identical for the operations used here

deviations.description: Added .gitignore to exclude /target directory from version control — standard Rust practice to prevent committing compiled binaries and build artifacts.

verification.cargo_test: pass — 1 test, all assertions (WAL mode, foreign keys, 13 tables, 10 indexes, idempotency)
